common.demoBanner: DEMO — Haisi sevhisi chaiyo. Musaisa zvinhu zvenyu zvechokwadi.

pay.body: EcoCash, OneMoney, Paynow, Visa, Mastercard, ZimSwitch or Telecash. Confirmation SMS in seconds.

apply.body: Business, building, trading and clearance applications — submitted, tracked and paid for online.

report.body: Take a photo, drop a pin, tell us what is wrong. The right council team gets it on their queue instantly.

documents.body: Rates receipts, permits and clearance certificates — QR-verifiable by any counter-officer or inspector.

track.body: Live dashboards show collections, spend and progress across the district — published every month.

stats.title: Zvakajeka, nguva ino.
stats.subtitle: Nhamba dzekanzuru, dzichivandudzwa masekondi makumi matatu ega ega.

services.title: Zvose zvamunoda kubva kukanzuru.
services.subtitle: Sarudza sevhisi. Hamuzotadze kutarisa musina account.

rates.title: Mitero neKubhadhara
rates.desc: Tarisa mari yekubhadhara ubhadhare neEcoCash, OneMoney kana kadhi.

businessLicence.title: Rezenisi reBhizinesi
businessLicence.desc: Nyorera rezenisi itsva, vandudza, kana utapurire kune mumwe.

report.title: Shuma Dambudziko
report.desc: Mapombi akaputsika, migwagwa, marara — nemufananidzo neGPS.

transparency.title: Zvakajeka
transparency.desc: Mari, matenda, misangano, mitemo — zvose zviri pachena.

transparency.title: Kwainoenda mari yenyu.
transparency.subtitle: Mari yewadhi, yakaunganidzwa vs yakashandiswa. Inovandudzwa mwedzi woga woga.

building.title: Building Bikita.
building.subtitle: Solar traffic lights, newly graded carriageways, rural electrification and dam rehabilitation — real infrastructure already on the ground.

p1.title: Kamungoma solar traffic signals
p1.body: Zimbabwe's first solar-powered intersection control — running day and night, fully off-grid.

p2.title: Kamungoma dual carriageway
p2.body: Dual-lane upgrade with solar street-lighting, improving travel times and night-time safety.

p3.title: Solar street-lighting rollout
p3.body: LED solar streetlights along major corridors and market centres, resilient to load-shedding.

p4.title: Rural electrification
p4.body: Solar mini-grids for rural clinics, schools and council service points in hard-to-reach wards.

p5.title: Dam rehabilitation
p5.body: Silting surveys, spillway repairs and fish-stocking programmes across Siya, Rozva and district dams.

p6.title: Signage & road safety
p6.body: Retro-reflective signage, pedestrian crossings and rumble strips along upgraded corridors.

visit.title: Visit Bikita.
visit.subtitle: Stone-kraal ruins, seasonal waterfalls, a sacred stink-bug forest and Zimbabwe’s largest rural dam — a small district with a lot to see.

cta.title: Tanga mumaminitsi maviri chete.
cta.subtitle: Nyoresa nechitupa nenhamba yefoni — hapana mapepa.

footer.tagline: Kanzuru yeBikita — nzvimbo yeveruzhinji yakavakirwa vanhu, vashandi uye makanzura.

login.title: Tinokugamuchirai zvakare
login.subtitle: Pinda kuti utarise mitero, zvawakakumbira nezvawakashuma.
login.invalid: Email kana password haina kurongeka. Edza rimwe reaccount dzedemo dziri pasi.

register.title: Gadzira account yako
register.subtitle: Zvinotora maminitsi maviri. Hapana mapepa.
register.otpDemoHint: Demo: chero nhamba dzitanhatu dzinoshanda kunze kwe000000.
register.passwordWeak: Password inofanira kuva nemabhii masere kana kupfuura.

chooseRole.title: Wagamuchirwa, Tendai.
chooseRole.subtitle: Une account mbiri — yemugari neyemushandi. Iyi yandiri nhasi?
chooseRole.residentDesc: Bhadhara mitero, kumbira masevhisi, tevera zvawakashuma.
chooseRole.staffDesc: Dashboard yeERP, vagari, kubhadhara, zvichemo zvevanhu.

notFound.title: Hatina kuwana peji iyoyi.
notFound.subtitle: Rinki ingangove yakaputsika, kana peji yakatamiswa.

serverError.title: Pane chakakanganisika kudivi redu.
serverError.subtitle: Takaziva nezvenyaya iyoyi uye tichaitarisa. Edza zvakare shure kwekanguva.

offline.title: Hauna internet.
offline.subtitle: Takachengeta statement nerizisi yako yekupedzisira kuti uende kuzvitarisa. Tichasimbisa zvimwe kana wavheka.

stub.title: Poto yemugari
stub.subtitle: Dashboard, mapurazi, kubhadhara, zvakakumbirwa nezvakashumwa zvichauya pano.

stub.title: ERP yeVashandi
stub.subtitle: KPIs, vagari, kubhadhara, zvakakumbirwa nemepu yezvichemo zvichauya pano.
